caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered tunic and a dark necklace, speaks against a solid black background. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her clothing. In the bottom left corner of the frames, a logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, she speaks and gestures with her hands to emphasize her points. In the first frame, her hands are held low and close to her body. As the video progresses, she lifts her hands and opens them wider, gesturing outward in the second and third frames. By the final frame, her hands remain raised and open as she continues to speak. The setting remains static, with only the woman's facial expressions and hand movements changing as she delivers her presentation.
